tasks.instruction:
Monitor the ControlWeave AI integration layer:
1. Use ControlWeave MCP to verify AI-powered endpoints are returning valid responses (gap analysis, compliance forecasting, copilot)
2. Check GitHub for any open issues labeled 'ai' or 'llm' — note unresolved ones older than 3 days
3. Review recent commits touching src/services/llm/ or AI-related routes for: missing provider fallback logic, unhandled rate limit errors, prompt injection risks, BYOK key handling mistakes
4. Check that tier-based AI rate limits are enforced in recent changes (Free: 10/month, Starter: 50/month)
5. For each confirmed AI integration failure or security issue without an existing open GitHub issue: call github_create_issue with title '[P{severity}] AI: {finding}', labels (severity:p1 or severity:p2, ai-integration), and details
6. Post a summary to #cw-gtm-alerts

Focus on: provider failures, prompt injection risks, BYOK key exposure, rate limit bypass, missing org context in AI calls.
